title: Gemini
content:
Gemini
 is one of the 
Immortal Astral Continent
's 
Nine Suns
 and a member of the 
Celestial Clan
. She is the founder of the 
Purple Sun Sect
 and rules the 
Eastern Continent
 in the Celestial Clan's territory.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

2.1

Book Eleven

2.2

Book Eleven

2.3

Book Twelve

2.4

Book Thirteen

Background
[
]

She was originally the strongest 
Celestial

Grand Empyrean
, possessing strength that even 
Jiu Di
 was wary of. However, during her last reincarnation, her soul split into 
Han Han
 and 
Wa Wa
 and she lost much of her strength. Furthermore, her two halves were not yet mature enough to fully use their potential as a Grand Empyrean without causing irreparable harm to themselves.

Sometime ago, she employed the 
Heaven Sect
's Ancestor - Empyrean Exalt 
Mu Rong
 - who was from the same generation as Great Soul Sect's 
Luo Yunhai
.

History
[
]

Book Eleven
[
]

When Wang Lin broke through to the Third Step and destroyed the Cave World's Tribulation, he encountered Wa Wa when he projected his divine sense out of the Cave to the Immortal Astral Continent. 
(edit : Book Eleven chapter 1617, she said her name is "Doll"(WaWa))

Book Eleven
[
]

Later, he encountered Han Han and Wa Wa, again, when he entered the Ancient One altar inside the spatial crack near the 
Cloud Sea
. He also saw 
Greed
 with them when they inadvertently helped scare off 
Seven-Colored Daoist
 for him.

Book Twelve
[
]

She aids 
Wang Lin
 greatly throughout his time in the 
Immortal Astral Continent
. She is also the only 
Grand Empyrean
 to do so without any ulterior motive. 
Wang Lin
 recognizes this when the other 
Celestial Clan

Grand Empyrean
's come to recruit him and picks her solely due to this karma, much to her (Han Han and Wa Wa's) delight.

Gemini helps 
Wang Lin
 once again later on by engaging 
Lian Daozhen
 while he dealt with the 
Immortal Imperial Teacher
. In order to combat the her fellow Grand Empyrean, she used a special technique that allowed Han Han and Wa Wa to fuse back into her original form. Though the fusion was unstable, it allowed her to contend with the Celestial Emperor until the unexpected arrival of 
Jiu Di
, 
Dao Yi
, and 
Wu Feng
. 

She was also the only 
Grand Empyrean
 to not be affected by the Ancestral Curse of the 
Celestial Ancestor
 as she chose not to fight 
Lian Daozhen
 with the others for the Celestial Ancestor's Head.

When Wang Lin pilfered the 
Celestial Ancestor
's head from 
Lian Daozhen
 after revealing that he was actually alive, he gave her the Celestial Ancestor's eyes. According to 
Jiu Di
 they would be able to fully restore the power she loss during her split and even make her stronger. 

However, when Wang Lin demanded to take 
Lian Daofei
 she reluctantly opposed him along with the other Celestial 
Grand Empyrean
's. She informed him that Lian Daofei was needed to maintain the seal on the 72 Foreign Beasts that were sealed by the 
Celestial Clan
 and if he were not there, the entire Celestial Clan could be destroyed.

When the other 
Celestial Clan

Grand Empyrean
's go their separate ways to recover from the backlash of the 
Celestial Ancestor
's Ancestral Curse, she admits to 
Wang Lin
 that she knew about his ties to the 
Ancient Clan
, to which the latter thanks her for doing so much for him despite knowing the truth.

Book Thirteen
[
]

When 
Wang Lin
 completes his 
Grand Empyrean
 Sun, she celebrates in the form of Han Han and Wa Wa.

She later appears with the rest of the 
Nine Suns
 in her true form due to sensing the great battle between 
Wang Lin
 and 
Gu Dao
. She agrees with 
Jiu Di
's request to pour their powers together to reverse time and witness the events that had transpired before their arrival, and is shocked to discover that 
Wang Lin
 had defeated 
Gu Dao
 and was now the strongest being in the 
Immortal Astral Continent
.

When the opening of the Immemorial God Realm began, she decided to stay in the 
Celestial Clan
 and did not join the rest of the 
Celestial

Grand Empyrean
's.
